item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Paladin's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned paladin─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level paladin to 60 and complete all job quests up through “This Little Sword of Mine.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
